_comment: CTK-161 D-3 — INV-01 parity golden. Pins formatDataRow() (lib/format/data-row.ts) and its Python mirror (scrapers/tools/data_row.py:format_data_row) to ONE output over canonical DataRowField[] inputs. Both lib/format/data-row.test.ts and scrapers/tests/test_data_row_parity.py assert against this file — drift on EITHER side fails its test. Cases exercise every value-kind in the discriminated union (string, relative-time, price-drop-new, vendor-markdown, invalidated, italic) + a multi-field composite. This pins the RENDER MECHANISM (label. value, em-dash separator), NOT any content-format's field selection (that layers on top and stays provisional per Q3). relative-time cases stay < 7d (pure epoch arithmetic, timezone-independent); the >= 7d absolute branch is local-tz dependent on both sides and deliberately not pinned here.

cases.name: composite-multi-field
cases.expected: Price. $80.00 $60.00 — Listed. 1 hour ago — Lineage. Acropora
